content.query:
DROP TABLE [OUT].[AFFILIATES_DAILY_REPORT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [OUT].[AFFILIATES_DAILY_REPORT]
( 
	[AffiliateName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ReportDate] [date]  NULL,
	[ReportType] [nvarchar](8)  NULL,
	[Source] [nvarchar](15)  NULL,
	[SubSource] [nvarchar](75)  NULL,
	[SubSourceID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](3)  NULL,
	[LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[EntryDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](30)  NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](30)  NULL,
	[Address1] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[Address2] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](35)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](2)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](7)  NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](25)  NULL,
	[Email] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Product] [nvarchar](10)  NULL,
	[ProductDescription] [nvarchar](25)  NULL,
	[Market] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[CurrentLeadDispositionID] [nvarchar](15)  NULL,
	[CurrentLeadDisposition] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ApptSet] [bit]  NULL,
	[AppointmentSetDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[AppointmentDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[NetIssue] [bit]  NULL,
	[Demo] [bit]  NULL,
	[Sold] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[NetSales] [money]  NULL,
	[JobID] [int]  NULL,
	[JobStatus] [nvarchar](30)  NULL,
	[JobContractDate] [datetime]  NULL,
	[AffiliateLeadNumber] [nvarchar](1)  NULL,
	[RenuityLeadScore] [nvarchar](1)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
